description: Bug: server outage, mass player complaints — critical urgency, P1 actions required

input.ticket_text: Your servers are completely down! I can't connect to ANY game. My clan is saying the same — we all dropped from a ranked match that was in progress. We're losing our ranked points for this! This has been going on for 40 minutes already. Is anyone even working on this?!

notes: Critical incident — at least 1 P1 action item (escalate to SRE/ops). Reply must acknowledge the incident urgency without making promises about ETA or compensation.
